policy: Unknown or unreviewed rights are excluded from the artifact until a decision is explicitly changed to include with rightsStatus=cleared.

decisions.reason: Each template has independent content and license material; no blanket inclusion decision.
Font embedding and redistribution rights have not been inventoried.
Image authorship and redistribution rights require per-resource review.
Plugins are outside the minimum profile and may carry independent dependencies or licenses.
Skills are outside the minimum profile and have per-skill license files.
Native runtime outputs require dependency license review plus exact ABI declarations.
